entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Signavio -...
entry.content: Thanks @Margit_Wagner - can you share any details about what the two successors will be and when they will be available? Also, any information on how they will be structured/different from the current certification? Just trying to make an educated decision on whether to take the one that is expiring since I am about 75% complete on the learning path or if it would be better for me to wait and take what is coming. Thanks for any additional information you can provide!

entry.title: Re: A Simple Guide to ERP, SAP S/4HANA, and the Role of a Cloud Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Hi @LisetteM ,

Thanks for your feedback! Glad it was helpful.

SAP certainly does keep track of this, but is not at liberty to disclose this information to the public without the explicit permission of the customer. You can find some customer stories here. 

Regards,

David

entry.title: Re: Rule to be implemented on blocking deliveries and iss...
entry.content:
Credit Check is either carried out at Sales Order or Delivery or PGI Level. 

Since it is performed at Sales Order level in your case, there is no reason to Block subsequent Delivery and Goods Issue unless critical fields are changed. 

Do you use the concept of New review Date? What is the typical time gap between the release of Sales Order and Goods Issue? 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Admin Resource Calculator
entry.content: looking for the same!

Sap help says its available. Thanks for your help.

Regards,

Venkata

entry.title: Re: GR-Relevant PO Confirmation Indicator Where Inbound D...
entry.content: My recommendation to keep it on even you are not using the inbound delivery documents

entry.title: Re: How to change User Source System for a user in LMS?
entry.content:
hi Viki!

i think through system administration -> system management tools -> Import data 

You select Import data and user and correct user source system.

I could not find any kba anymore with this setting but it worked in the past.


thank you!
Adina

entry.title: Re: How to setup ABD document creation?
entry.content:
Either set the flag KNVV-AGREL or switch off the check in the process type.

Regards,

Thorsten

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate – What’s New in User Experience guidance with SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: I want to change MM072 message type in SAP
entry.content: As explained by Prasoon -- you would not able to change it to W-- if you do not see the message even through configuration --you can click new entries and change it to W ---but if it is hardcoded --then whatever you do it will not work -- if you do not know how to change configuration

entry.title: Navigating the Modern Sales Landscape: The AI Advantage, SAP Sales Cloud Intelligent Sales Add-on
entry.content:
*Authored by Vinita Sinha - CX Scale and Solution Value Adoption Lead Americas | CX Solution Advisory | SAP Adoption Services Center

In today's fast-paced marketplace, sales representatives grapple with the challenge of engaging with highly informed buyers who conduct extensive research before making purchasing decisions. This blog explores the hurdles faced by sales professionals, including the limitations of intuition-based selling and traditional CRM tools. It highlights the transformative potential of intelligence-driven sales solutions, such as the Intelligent Sales Add-on for SAP Sales Cloud, in overcoming these challenges.  

Discover how integrating intelligence-backed insights and having a structured approach to sales with the Intelligent Sales Add-on for SAP Sales Cloud can drive better results over the long term, enabling organizations to thrive in an era of innovation, agility, and value-based selling. 

Challenges salespeople face today   

Buyers are a step ahead: In today's marketplace, sales representatives face a significant challenge as buyers are increasingly well-informed, often conducting extensive research before engaging with sales professionals. This trend has shifted the dynamics of the sales process, requiring reps to deliver interactions that are not only meaningful and valuable but also differentiated and personalized to the specific needs and preferences of each prospect. To effectively engage modern buyers, sales reps must be able to provide insights, solutions, and experiences that go beyond what buyers can discover on their own, thereby establishing trust, adding unique value, and ultimately driving successful outcomes. 

Relying on intuition-based selling: In such a competitive and dynamic marketplace, relying on one’s gut and intuition alone to sell can be disastrous. It can lead to inconsistency, subjectivity, limited scalability, risk of missing out on opportunities, and pose a challenge for training and development due to lack of transferability. 

Overheads of tools that don’t support selling: CRM tools that are purely system of records are not reliable since salespeople resist adopting it. If the system doesn’t help them sell, why use it? This is a big challenge since the barrier to adoption means having data that is not trustworthy or reliable for any decision making. Tools need to be easy to use and make salespeople successful. Intelligence-backed tools that rely on patterns of success and failure to advise on sales opportunities can save time and efforts that can be spent building relationships with buyers 

Lack of Insights: Salespeople need insights about their customers that are holistic. Buyers need to feel that the seller knows them and their history, that their needs are understood, that salespeople have their best interests in their mind, that they can rely on salespeople being their trusted advisors, etc. To facilitate these needs, tools need to equip salespeople with insights about the relationship, network, buying history, meaningful products, selling value and more. Relationship based selling in fact is crucial for long term success. 

The AI Advantage 

Most organizations have already started to invest a lot of time, resources, and energy into evaluating how AI can benefit then in their business processes to stay competitive. Within the realm of CRM, it's widely recognized that low adoption rates pose a significant barrier, often resulting in poor data quality. AI effectiveness hinges on factors like data volume, quality, and balance. For organizations to effectively leverage AI, they must establish processes and utilize tools that streamline and automate data capture, making it intuitive for salespeople and reducing resistance. Implementing intelligent tools embedded with AI functionalities that genuinely enhance sales efficiency fosters improved adoption rates, enhances data quality, and ultimately drives overall success with AI. This synergy creates a self-reinforcing cycle of improvement. 

Prepare for Success 

Integrating intelligence backed, data-driven insights and a more structured approach to sales can help mitigate these challenges and drive better results over the long term. Sales processes can thus mature from an ad-hoc and chaotic approach to a visionary state where innovation, agility, long term customer relationships and value-based selling thrives.  

The Intelligent Sales Add-on for SAP Sales Cloud make selling reliable, and helps salespeople gain efficiencies to drive better sales outcomes. Below are the key capabilities and highlights of the add-on  

Sales Effectiveness

  • Enhance pipeline visibility and improve forecast accuracy with Intelligent Sales Execution which has capabilities for pipeline management, forecast tracking, pipeline flow and analysis and trend analysis
  • Discover high propensity-to-win opportunities with Pipeline Manager. Expose at-risk opportunities with intuitive pipeline visualizations, maintain pipeline hygiene and provide detailed roll-ups with ease 

 

  • Improve forecast accuracy while reducing the time-to-forecast with Forecast Tracker. The importance of accurate forecasts cannot ever be overstated since this blind spot can cause delays, revenue losses and affect business outcomes. With the flexibility of doing a what-if analysis, having information of deals at the product level, adding notes for follow-ups, quickly identifying deals for proactive engagement and tracking forecast submissions prepares you for accuracy in forecasting 

  • Understand Pipeline Flow and proactively resolve issues with root cause analysis. Gain a full view of your pipeline and easily track new and existing deals visually. Explore the evolution of opportunities to uncover selling and coaching insights 

  • Leverage Trend Analytics to predict the progress of current quarter opportunities based on historical data 

 

  • Reduce sales cycle length and increase opportunity win rates with Guided Selling. Ensure adherence to flexible sales methodology and provide actionable insights to expedite sales progress and close deals. Achieve easier onboarding of Sales Reps using Smart Assist functions, reducing time to sell. Leverage the intelligent recommendations and predictions driving confidence in customer purchase decisions. Guided Selling can help with increasing productivity and sales effectiveness, and lead to better adoption. This also leads to better data, processes, quality of information and reliability.  

  • Guide your sales reps to progress on opportunities with prescribed yet flexible activity proposals via Playbooks, leaving the gut-based, unstructured ways of selling behind. Tools and technologies like Playbooks provide significant advantage by presenting tailored content at the right time, with efficiency and in response to changing customer demands 

  

  • Increase sales effectiveness and make better informed decisions with consolidated ML based Customer Insights. Provide key insights for each account for data driven actions and ML backed recommendations to grow accounts with potential and mitigate challenges. 

Leverage machine learning to surface accounts with growth potential and ones with challenges.  

Provide specific Insights for a customer - helping every account manager to take data-driven decisions and actions from one screen 

 

Smart Selling 

  • Leverage ML-scoring insights for Leads Intelligence and Deal Intelligence (opportunities scoring) to focus on the most promising ones, while ensuring proper planning for the at-risk ones. Have realistic forecasts considering these insights 

  • Use Business Text Intelligence to recommend activities based on notes, and pre-fill information for sales efficiency 

  • Leverage Relationship Intelligence and network to strengthen relationships with key contacts. Easily add accounts and contacts that are not there in the system, know the best-connected colleagues for warm introductions, improve relationship scores and view interaction history 

Relationship Intelligence 

My Network 

In summary, navigating today's sales landscape demands overcoming challenges posed by informed buyers and outdated sales methods. By embracing intelligence-driven solutions like the Intelligent Sales Add-on for SAP Sales Cloud, organizations can drive efficiency, foster innovation, and build lasting customer relationships. With a focus on data-driven insights and smart selling techniques, businesses position themselves for success in a dynamic marketplace. By integrating these tools effectively, they can thrive amidst evolving sales trends and achieve sustainable growth.

entry.title: Problem with QE72
entry.content: Someone can help me with QE72? It doesn't show inspection lots to elaborate, but in QA32 they are. Does exist any prerequisites to use this transaction? Thank you

entry.title: Re: Error: Could not connect to the endpoint URL while de...
entry.content:
Hello RjainCap,

Good question,
Yes , Below is a sample listing view of runs and one model.

Thank you ,
Mich

aws s3 ls s3://hello-aicore-data/example-dataset/house-price-toy/
PRE data/
PRE model/

aws s3 ls s3://hello-aicore-data/example-dataset/house-price-toy/model
PRE model/

aws s3 ls s3://hello-aicore-data/example-dataset/house-price-toy/model/
PRE e2d8d89238047e54/
PRE e5040e89387a330a/
PRE eaf87aeb56cb9cd7/
PRE ebee5c01cc324e12/
PRE eed8ca84c3282328/
PRE efb703b375141f45/

aws s3 ls s3://hello-aicore-data/example-dataset/house-price-toy/model/e2d8d89238047e54/
PRE housemodel/

aws s3 ls s3://hello-aicore-data/example-dataset/house-price-toy/model/e2d8d89238047e54/housemodel/
2024-02-07 13:45:59 3348 model.pkl

Astrid

entry.title: how to send a url image, pdf file, text file to AL11
entry.content: I got a requirement and in that I am getting attachement text from sales order and then I need to send it to AL11 and Could you please provide the steps to send url, image format, pdf file, to AL11 directory...I got the text attachment from sales order  into internal table. If it is image format or pdf file, url attachment then what is best way to send it to AL11 directory

entry.title: Your Opportunity to Influence SAP Globalization Services:SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Projects
entry.content:
SAP Globalization Services provides a holistic localization experience through product capabilities and content, as well as underlying technical capabilities that enable customers to use, and get value from, their core business applications in different locations, adapting to local needs. Our portfolio and localization offerings contain tax management, digital business document compliance, HR & Payroll, payments, partner extensibility capabilities for localization as well as internationalization across end-to-end business processes. 

With the first cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative in 2024, customers and partners are welcome to register until March 08, 2024 for the SAP Globalization Services projects and exchange feedback and ideas with SAP’s product management directly, to define and shape future product directions. 

SAP Globalization Services 

  • Implementation of HR procedures per civil service law 
  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Public Edition 
  • Pilot customers for DMEE to DMEEX migration 
  • WHT Integration of WHT FICA model with FI 

 Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register. If you are interested in other topics as well, find here the list of all projects offered in this cycle. 

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP. 

Thank you in advance for your participation, 

Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Manager 2110 - Custom EntitySet - missing i...
entry.content:
Indeed, you still need to assign the oMDO to a persona. When the client app starts the synchronization it builds batch requests with all entities included in the current persona. Check this blog post for more information.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/configuring-features-and-personas-in-sap-service-and-asset-manager/ba-p/13545534

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Signavio -...

entry.title: Re: Error: Could not connect to the endpoint URL while de...

entry.title: Can you edit a contract term document when executing an administrative amendment type
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm looking to confirm whether its feasible to configure the system to allow for a contract term document to be edited when executing an Administrative amendment in the contract workspace.

If it is possible, I'm wondering is it also feasible to restrict the fields that can be edited when executing this amendment type.

I've spent many hours searching the product documentation on SAP Ariba Connect but could not find any information on this subject.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP BusinessObj...

entry.title: Re: CRM Courses
entry.content:
Hi @SounakP ,

Welcome aboard and thanks for the question!

The answer to this question depends heavily on your local job market. I recommend doing some SAP job searches in your location to get an idea on where to study.

As a general rule, FICO is a high demand topic. It requires some understanding of accounting before you approach the SAP-specific content. An SAP Finance certification track is not yet available for free yet either
Check out this blog for info on finance. 

Also consider this.

entry.title: Re: How can an independent consultant purchase a new 'red...
entry.content: @Margit_Wagner, is there a download available that lists all the courses available in the newly redesigned Learning Hub subscription for customers and one for the partners? I have a download from before the hub was redesigned that has similar info (what was included with discovery edition, enterprise support, professional, etc). I did note how much the price has gone down and the inclusion of certifications and live systems! That is fabulous!

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Valuation with Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Marc,

Any of the ledgers (group, profit center, legal) can be defined as a group reporting preparation ledger - all that means is that the group reporting dimensions are updated into the accounting document at the time of posting. You can see the contents of the ledger with the transactional elimination postings either in the financial statements in operational accounting or in group reporting if you choose to include these ledgers in group reporting. Generally speaking, both the group and profit center valuation view deliver "management" views of the group results rather than a full consolidation.

Regards, Janet

entry.title: Re: SAP HEC vs SAP RISE

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hi. I'm interested in the digital initiative. I was laid off in June 2023 and would like to augment my experience with a certification in SAP. (I'm also a woman - see there are some criteria in order to be eligible for the program). I've used SAP for 10 years as an accountant and have been involved in many process excellence initiatives. But all of my experience was as an end user. I think the certification would help be to advance my career and land a job in the consultant arena. I'm interested in taking the SAP S4/HANA Financial Accounting Associate certification. Thank you for any information on getting access to the learning program for free!

Thank you for the information. I recently read an article that SAP dominates the market, recent figures put the market share at 24%. I found 14 customer stories that made the transition. It is good to know.

On another note, I did most of my training exercises with the Fiori apps, but had some real world experience with S/4HANA without the apps. Can you use the Fiori apps without the Cloud implementation?

entry.title: Re: SQL code: -10692 occurred while accessing table
entry.content:
Dear Farhan,

Please check:

  • 2399990 - How-To: Analyzing ABAP Short Dumps in SAP HANA Environments
    (search: 10692)
  • 2481736 - SQL code: -10692 occurred while accessing table <TABLE_NAME>

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:

2) Exploring and Configuring SAP Sales Cloud Ver 2

I have also  emailed  digitalskills@sap.com to receive the free certification voucher. Hoping to receive it soon and certify myself.

Thanks,

Shalini Chauhan

David

entry.content:
FAGL_FC_TRANS

Please suggest on this configuration

entry.title: SAP Build App Bug
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm testing my application in web browser and it is working fine, able to post the data in database.

But same application if I test in SAP Build Preview App then in that case I'm getting oAuth 2 authorization issue.

Any idea then please let us know.

Information is given in this page about signing in with oAuth 2 in firebase doc.

But does anyone have idea how to get [Google_Id_Token] then please drop your answer.

curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY]' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-binary '{"postBody":"id_token=[GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN]&providerId=[google.com]","requestUri":"[http://localhost]","returnIdpCredential":true,"returnSecureToken":true}'

 

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: ERP Issue - Updating PR value in Ariba
entry.content:
Hi All,

I hope this is the correct forum for this post.

When a user tries to increase the value of the PR and is fully approved we get this error from the ERP system.

How could this be and it only seems to happen in a few instances?

ERPPushFailPurgeStateERPPushFailTimeCreatedERPPushFailTimeUpdatedERPPushFailBaseId Number In Set = 1
Number = 413
SAP Id = 06
SAP Module = Addon
SAP Screen = Addo
SAP Field = Addon
Error Message = Sum of percentages >200,0< exceeds 100 %
Error System = RETPRO50
Error Client = Add

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SOD Monitoring / Privileged Access Level (Part 3.6/3.7)
entry.content:
Hi Ravitej,

I think you are looking for a document called „Reasonable Assurance Report (ISAE 3000) on the S/4 HANA Cloud Edition Authorization Role Concept“ available here.

Best regards,

Florian

entry.title: ATP confirmation behavior - result mode explanation
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I was going through the SAP Note 2604756 and trying to understand the difference between Option A and Option D in the configuration for 'Sales Area: Default values for Availability Check' (OVZJ). 

Per my current understanding Option A: Deals with One-time delivery and I assume that it applies to both dialogue and batch options ? Please correct me if I am wrong in my assumptions.

Option D also shows for batches as per the SAP Note. 

If anyone helps to clear my doubt, that will be a great help. Thanks in advance. 

Regards,

Arindam

entry.title: Re: Error: Authentication kind "jwt" configured, but no X...
entry.content:
Not this is not a bug. This is the documented behavior. See authentication is enforced in production. 

You may explicitly enable mocked strategy in production by adding the following to file .cdsrc.json 

{
        "requires": {
                "auth": "mocked"
        }
}

entry.title: Re: Display PDF in My Inbox from DMS
entry.content: Thank you for showing me this note !

entry.title: VIP Program – "Navigate Your Way to the SAP SuccessFactors Integrated Learning Experience" APJ/EMEA
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the event invite and login details.    


"Navigate Your Way to the SAP SuccessFactors Integrated Learning Experience" (APJ/EMEA)

The introduction of the new integrated learning experience is arguably the biggest change to SuccessFactors Learning in many years. Please join us to discover the new capabilities already available along with what is being released in 2024 to help with your path towards adoption before this becomes universal in 2025.
We will also discuss insights into the roadmap and timelines.


Tuesday, 9th April 2024
15:00 SGT Singapore
9:00 CET Europe

REGISTER HERE!

 

If you have any questions, please get in touch with your Regional Program Manager:

For Americas karla.trevino@sap.com 

For Europe, Middle East & Africa samanta.ferreri@sap.com

For Asia Pacific, Japan & Greater China vanesa.medricka@sap.com

entry.content:

Joerg

entry.title: Re: OData V2 - Filtering collection using the "any" opera...
entry.content:
Such queries are not possible with OData V2.

As a workaround you can send two requests: filter on A_BusinessPartnerAddress to get a (hopefully short) list of business partner ids, then use these values to filter on A_BusinessPartner.

entry.title: Re: Work Instruction error. 403 Forbidden SSL required.
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

Thanks for your reply. I have already done this setup as seen below. 

Is it something to do with a certification? 

KR,
Sayuj.

entry.title: Re: HANA Data Lake on premise?
entry.content: Given that you are on premise, you already have on premise storage options such as SANs.

entry.title: Re: Migrate from multi tenant architecture to CCV2
entry.content:
Hi @0021969339 '

A lot depends on the utilization of the multi-tenancy of SAP Commerce / Hybris. Moving from multi-tenancy to single tenancy of CCV2 / SAP Commerce Cloud brings up some key questions:

  1. Can the data/workflows be hosted on a single tenant? Are you able to segment the data appropriately on a single tenant to fulfill the business needs? Given that likely each tenant shares a common codebase, common domain model, but has a different data set - it is important to see if it is possible to model the current multi-tenant solution as a single tenant solution
  2. Do you need additional environments in CCV2? The other avenue is to "fake" multi-tenancy on CCV2 by the presence of additional Dev/Stage/Production environments. Each environment instance should have its own database, effectively separating the concerns. Additional environments might come at an additional cost on top of the existing CCV2 costs, so it is important to check with your SAP account rep to confirm.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Intelligent Lookup Series – Harmonize your internal datasets with external data
entry.content:
Hi Tim,

thanks for this really nice Blog and the insights. However, there is one question left on my side. Let us consider a situation where a real business user is required. Let's say we have product master date from different source systems without central Master Data Management. And there will be no way to get this.

But in Datasphere we want to map them. As a modeler I can build an intelligent lookup and maybe try to match them by name. But ultimately some business people (controller) need to provide the missing matches.

I have a hard time to imagine how a controller would do that. They should NOT create or edit any rule. The only thing I want them to do is to match manually.

Is an intelligent lookup the right way to go? Should those users be able to provide missing matches in another local table that will be linked via joins?
What do you think?
Kind regards
Meinrad

entry.title: Re: Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Implemen...
entry.content:
Hi!

Thanks for you comment but in the Query Class of a custom entity, I don't have a reported parameter. Or can I create one?

BR, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Few checks are not clearing in automatic EBS -SAP ECC...
entry.content: Hi Sanil

entry.title: Re: Invalid column name error when passing Name parameter
entry.content:
Hi Amber, in the Command query WHERE clause try putting the First_Name@ prompt in single quotes. Otherwise it's assumed that the first name parameter value is a field name.

i.e. cs.First_Name = '{?First_Name@}'

entry.title: Re: Work Instruction error. 403 Forbidden SSL required.
entry.content:
Hi Sayuj,

The 403 Forbidden error due to access limitation or SSL setup. You may need to check with ICF config , how HTTPs request being handled. Use request tracing tools like httpwatch to analyse further , mostly certificate issue . 

You can perform Quick check on request details

1. Open the developer tool in browser and try to access the WI , keeping the developer tool open .

2. Now open the network tab and check the request details which is specific to WI .

3. Check the request url (complete) and reach out to Network/SAP Basis expert . 

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Fiori Custom Apps
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to make a @Consumption.semanticObject:'InternalOrder' for a field. However, all apps that have the semantic object "Internal Order" are displayed. Accordingly, I only want to display selected apps. Therefore, my idea is to define the required apps with a new semantic object so that only these are displayed.
My questions would be how I can best solve this.
Maybe create a separate catalog and reference the apps and declare another semantic object?

As an example, I would only like to define "Display internal order" and "Manage internal order" for the field.

Many thanks in advance! 🙂

entry.title: Partners Are Vital to Your Company’s Success When Transitioning to Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Are you ready to shift to a modern Cloud ERP solution where you can take advantage of the latest innovations with AI, and ensure security, compliance, and scalability? Or are you holding on to your legacy system and watching your competitors innovate with speed and pass you by?

If you’re ready to start your transformative journey, let me share my insights on the importance of leveraging the right team to support this digital transformation, and how to find it. Before I show you how, I want to point you to a recent post by SAP executive Eric van Rossum, who wrote an article on why the move to a Cloud ERP holds strategic importance for companies around the world, and why it’s important for your company’s success.

In that article, he cautions that companies that fail to modernize their legacy systems risk falling behind competitors who are running their organizations on modern cloud systems. Companies that fail to move to a cloud ERP system clearly don’t have the ability to establish new business models at scale, expand into new markets, adapt, and grow as they are hindered by antiquated systems. In short, they get left behind.

As such, the decision to modernize mission-critical ERP systems doesn’t happen often due to the wide reaching impact on organizations and implementing a new ERP system is a complex endeavor. And you must get it right. And to get it right, you need the right methodology, and you need the right team. In another article, Peter Baskin explained what having the right methodology means, so I encourage you to read that.

Now let’s discuss the second key component to your successful transformation – the right team. Let me explain how you can find the right partner.

 

The Value of the Right Partner

With more than 5,000 customers having experienced this digital transformation, SAP’s partner ecosystem has played an important and powerful role in delivering customer success. Partners support over 90% of customer implementations, giving them the expertise and experience you want when considering the transformation ahead of you.

Your company will likely only go through an ERP implementation once or maybe twice in your career, so leveraging the proven experience of a company that has done it numerous times and has unmatched experience is an absolute must.

After all, you know your business and you excel at it. You live it every day. Similarly, implementation experts know their business. Not only do they excel at what they do, they bring a wealth of knowledge - from product to industry to business process. Their expertise is in delivering successful cloud migration journeys and the great news is that you, too, can leverage their experience.

 

In Any Relationship, Finding the Right Partner is Key

Companies seek a reliable and skillful partner who can show that they understand their business and industry. They are also looking for a partner they can trust to be their technology and business advisor.

On the other side, consulting firms and system integrators can differentiate themselves from their competition through their skills and experience. These firms strive to demonstrate that they have a successful track record, expertise, and work style to meet a customer’s business needs.

SAP has a large ecosystem of over 25,000 partners with different skills, maturity, and experience
to meet the varied needs of organizations. SAP partners are provided with a comprehensive training program to ensure they are current with the latest tools, innovations, and methodologies. Our partners gain credibility in the marketplace by differentiating their skillsets based on their solution capabilities, industry expertise, and project experience.

 

Helping You Identify the Right Partner for Your Needs

Customers require guidance in finding the best-fit partner for their business or industry, a qualified partner, one that is right for their company. To do this a company can leverage the Competency Framework that helps cut through the noise, allowing customers to find the expertise they need – no matter their business challenges, company size, or location.

The Competency Framework recognizes partners who meet the rigorous criteria and requirements of competency with designations that allow them to differentiate their skills, levels of expertise and acumen.

The competency levels (essential, advanced, and expert) and descriptors for each level are displayed below. Use them as a guide for the type of partner that you may need for your specific business needs.

When selecting a partner, SAP encourages customers to leverage the SAP Partner Finder. This platform is designed to help customers discover and connect with partners within our SAP ecosystem to support a successful cloud transformation.

Sample screen from SAP Partner Finder showcasing a partner identified as a “Expert” on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

In the partner profile on SAP Partner Finder, you can see a partner’s achieved competencies for SAP S/4HANA Cloud. These achieved competencies are used to provide best-fit partner rankings in SAP Partner Finder search results. This pool of information makes it easier and faster to find the best partner to fit your company’s needs.

SAP Partner Finder will soon have a new filter to search for partners with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (“RISE with SAP”) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (“GROW with SAP”) competencies, making it easier for customers to find the right partner for their Cloud ERP implementations.

 

The Time to Act is NOW

Now that you understand the value of a partner and how to select one, the time to act is now if you are considering transitioning to a cloud ERP solution from SAP.

As part of the RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization program, SAP is offering our customers a transformation incentive (for a limited time) to help offset the cost for new purchases of RISE with SAP or GROW with SAP.

To learn more about the RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization program and the transformation incentive, please join us at the upcoming RISE into the Future event on February 28, where we’ll discuss how to confidently migrate to cloud ERP.

entry.title: FIFO based Inventory Valuation in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community members,

Our client needs inventory valuation on basis of FIFO method, please guide us how it can be achieved in public cloud.

 

FIFO based Consumption of material having Price control V and Material Type ROH

  1. GR at Different Price
 

Qty

Rate

Amount

GR1

1000

45

45000

GR2

1000

50

50000

Total

2000

47.5

95000

 

  1. Standard System behavior

Issue

1500

47.5

71250

Remaining

500

47.5

23750

 

 

 

95000

 

  1. As per Requirement shared by client

first GR

1000

45

45000

Second GR

500

50

25000

 

 

 

70000

Remaining

500

50

25000

 

As 2000 Qty of Material is purchased at two different rates, while doing goods issue (consumption) of 1500 Qty Material system should issue first 1000 Qty @45 rate and second 500 Qty @50 and remaining invetory value should be 25000 for Qty 500@50 

As per above scenario valuation should be done on FIFO basis and same should be reflected in report MB5B ( Stocks on Posting Date) or Analyze stocks in Date Range.

MB5B à

Analyze stocks in Date Range

entry.title: Re: Creating Letters with CR
entry.content: Hi  SSystemes24, if you are dealing with a lot of invoices you can also look into a conversion / automation tool...search on "pdf to database" and you should get a bunch of options. This way you'll also have those scans in your database for a new DB-based letter / contract report and any future data analysis that you want to do.

entry.content: The solution worked perfectly for me, thank you very much for the help

entry.title: Re: I am trying to get the CR 2011 Trial license key for...
entry.content:
CR 2011 is end of life.

CR for Visual Studio only supports the latest 4.7 and 4.8 framework because of end of life by Microsoft.

Go here and find CR for VS and you'll get the latest SP 35 downloads:

https://www.sap.com/canada/products/technology-platform/crystal-reports.html

entry.title: Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP - Manual Deployed Fiori app not working
entry.content:
Hi,

During the learning I've deployed the risk-management app to my trial.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/exercise-performing-a-manual-deployment_d0546e9b-810f-41b1-b554-e2a01c9dc7b0 

However when I try to "Go" get the data I get this error.

 

When I check the batch call I see this:

The srv part crashes with this error:

 

It relates to this part of the code:

 

When I remove the generated "filter" part of the call to, it works fine:

 

I can even run it with either of the 2 filters... however when both are added (with an or) it fails:
  • IsActiveEntity eq false
  • SiblingEntity/IsActiveEntity eq null

Running it locally in BAS works as well.

Can anyone explain what might be wrong here ?

(sorry about all the images, but I got about 1000 errors trying to post about HTML being used in the post)

entry.title: Re: Few checks are not clearing in automatic EBS -SAP ECC...
entry.content: Hi Sanil, Thanks for the reverting Here is  more information, below is the Bank Statement line for the outgoing checks(payment) while in the EBS processing the system doesnot clear the check "7000180". The strange think is only few  cheques doesn't get cleared in EBS where as other get cleared hence no issue in Search string. Below is the sucess statement BRS line fyi Issue : Statement Line: 16,475,55914,Z,01192408150,0007000180/ Success : Statement: 16,475,28303,Z,04792110277,0007000196/

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports XI TLS1.2
entry.content:
That version had no idea of newer TLS 1.2 and thus it will never work with that security. CR was updated to support that security format.

Note, it has nothing to do with Crystal, Security is done through the Client, CR XI will not recognize the newer MS Clients that support TLS 1.2.

Upgrade to CR 2020 64 bit or 2016 32 bit is your only option

entry.title: Re: DEMO21
entry.content:
I am using DEMO21 - which is a Fully-Activated Appliance with additional demo content

the fiscal year's for Asset's are not CLOSED (and not current) for either company codes 1710 or 1010

entry.title: Re: how to send a url image, pdf file, text file to AL11
entry.content: Write to "AL11 directory" = ABAP statements OPEN DATASET, TRANSFER, etc. How to read attachments has been answered hundreds of times, there are some blog posts, code in GitHub repository, etc.

entry.title: Re: Even though gt_output2 is empty, the previous data is displayed.
entry.content: Probably you are instantiating the ALV control more than once without emptying the container: several ALV controls in the same container => only the first one is shown.

entry.title: Re: Barcode generation works fine only for first report /...
entry.content:
ERP software usually indicates it's some third party application of integration.

I suggest contacting the makers to debug the issue.

Off hand it suggests the routine to print is resetting the printer properties to default margins.

Thanks

Destination on SAP BTP Side 

Connection is fine

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sap Build App Community
entry.content: Hello Can you please answer my query posted on link : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-app-bug/qaq-p/13616106

entry.title: Re: Download excel with multiple sheets using Transformation
entry.content:
To write to several cells, you must use one APPEND to the internal table per cell.

    ls_xls_cell-cell_content = fieldname_1.
    APPEND ls_xls_cell TO ls_xls_row-cells. " column A

    ls_xls_cell-cell_content = fieldname_2.
    APPEND ls_xls_cell TO ls_xls_row-cells. " column B

    ls_xls_cell-cell_content = fieldname_3.
    APPEND ls_xls_cell TO ls_xls_row-cells. " column C

What you did is to write to only one cell (i.e. only one APPEND), with field names separated with a horizontal tabulation, which writes all the field names into the same cell, not in several cells.

Concerning your issue about only one sheet being generated, I cannot reproduce, my program (based on yours with all non-compiling stuff removed) generates two sheets successfully.

entry.title: Solr search - searching for a field with hyphen in it
entry.content:

Note: The field is a text field, fuzziness is not enabled. I am escaping - with a \\

I would like to get only products like xx123-456xx along with the 123-456 (obv)

Please guide me on how to achieve this. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Convert Date from OData
entry.content:
Hello @ITM_Benedikt ,

 

Use the below function inside formula section to change the format you wish for.

FORMAT_DATETIME_LOCAL(date/time, format)

 Example

FORMAT_DATETIME_LOCAL("2019-07-11T13:06:15+03:00", "DD.MM.YYYY")

Output:

11.07.2019

entry.title: Re: How can I build Android app from SAP Build Apps
entry.content: In SAP Build App once you build your application then you can use Launch view and create build apk. You can also upload this app then in google play store.

entry.title: Re: output controller: spool request selection force printing on both sides
entry.content: How about setting printer settings as below?

entry.title: Client-side validation + Input sanitization = Intrusion Detection
entry.content:
Cloud applications are particularly vulnerable to intrusions via password reuse or via credentials found in a Github repository using said application. Such intrusions won't be detected by a Web Application Firewall. You may detect these as an anomalies with an Intrusion Detection System, maybe because the connection time or IP Geo-location is unusual, but the session will not be terminated automatically due to the high risk of a false positive.

Now, as attackers are likely to try escalating privileges or searching around for interesting information from this account, a better / complementary way to detect intrusion is to spread honeytokens: useless, deceptive elements such as cookies that hackers will have a hard time resisting interacting with and that normal users won't even notice. I talked about the efficiency of such a solution in my previous post, that you can find here: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/disinformation-for-the-greater-good/ba-p/13581083

Listen, Cédric: I don't have the time!

Right. As a developer swamped with feature requests and tight deadlines, it's hard to find the time to think about which element to deploy, to assess the risk of a false positive, and to implement honeytokens in a secure way. Doubly so if your application relies on a set of central services already dealing with session cookies and with the login form, leaving not much room for your creativity.

Hopefully, there is one particular interesting case where intrusion detection can be baked in, basically for free. Let me explain:

Input sanitization

- as a good developer, you are already sanitizing your inputs (of course you do).
- this means that when you receive a malformed input, that input is dropped, protecting the backend.

For example, this /search/:id endpoint expecting a positive number will discard a request for id "-1" or for id "a". But it's unlikely that you log rejected requests, am I right? As if it gets logged, it's unlikely to be considered an intrusion attempt, as a failed search could very much be due to a botched copy-paste action.

+ Client-side validation

Now let's talk about client-side validation for a second. For a long time, I've disregarded client-side validation as a security feature since it can easily be bypassed. Too many times I've seen developers thinking they were secure, blindly trusting client input to be sanitized. But I revised my position: as a standalone feature, client-side validation is useless for security. But combined with backend-side validation, it becomes extremely potent as it removes the uncertainty of being under attack: this /search request for id "-1" cannot anymore be due to a botched copy-paste. It must come from a user purposefully probing the backend, as a non-malicious user's input will be blocked at the client side.

= Intrusion Detection

What this means is that since you're already verifying that your search id is a positive number on the backend side, then all that's left to do (if not already done) is to verify the same thing on the client side, and to log rejected requests as intrusion attempts.

But I'm not vulnerable, they said!

Why log in the first place, since the endpoint is not vulnerable? The reason is that this endpoint in particular might not be vulnerable, but what about all the other ones? Raising a security event will help dramatically to reduce this dwell time of 16 days*. With such a very low risk of a false positive, the user session can be locked immediately before the attacker can find a valid entry point. And as attackers begin to be wary of such alerts, they will have to rely less and less on bypassing client-side validation, which will be beneficial to all applications still missing proper backend-side validation.

A big benefit worth a small effort, don't you think?

* according to Mendiant: https://www.infosecurity-magazine.com/news/cyber-intrusion-detection-time/

entry.title: Re: UKM_BP_DISPLAY missing search criteria country (kna1-land1)

I am having trouble in understanding the reason why RUN TEST option in create tab is showing status 404 ? All the details entered by me is correct. I have gone through the entire set up 4-5 times yet not able to find the root cause. Set up of BTP definition is correct, I have checked it thoroughly.

Right now I am using SAP Build Process Automation in free plan and instance has been created using the standard plan. My set up in create tab is also correct.

Help me out here to resolve this problem.

entry.title: Re: Getting status 404 during RUN TEST in Process Automation, all details are correct, What to do?
entry.content: BTP Destination is also correctly done.

entry.title: Is it possible to add 'agency' candidate type filter to help support recruiters with searches?
entry.content: Our candidate search allows for recruiters to search by candidate type - internal and external - but there is no option to filter on agency candidates. Is it possible to add this to the Candidate Type dropdown? If so, where is this configured?

entry.title: SAP Developer News, February 22nd, 2024
entry.content:
UI5 TypeScript Walkthrough: https://sap-samples.github.io/ui5-typescript-walkthrough/

'Did You Know' shorts Nr. 13 – Luigi - the enterprise-ready micro frontend framework

  • Luigi - Getting Started: https://docs.luigi-project.io/docs/getting-started

SAP Build and SAP Build Code – are they actually the same thing -Blog Post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-and-sap-build-code-comprehensive-tools-for-novice-to-expert/ba-p/13585174

SAP Build Hackathon Blog Post: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/participate-at-the-sap-build-hackathon-in-april-2024/ba-p/13613297

SAP Build Hackathon Registration Link: https://events.sap.com/eur/sap-build-hackathon/en/home

What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2024

  • What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2024: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168744
  • Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168424
  • What's New in SAP Datasphere in January: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168881
  • Bi-Directional Integration Between SAP Datasphere & SAP Analytics Cloud: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168781

 

=====================================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:08 UI5 TypeScript Walkthrough

0:38 'Did You Know' shorts Nr. 13 – Luigi - the enterprise-ready micro frontend framework

1:40  SAP Build and SAP Build Code – are they same?

3:55 What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2024

Transcript

[Nico]Hi everyone and welcome to the SAP Developer News. The famous and very popular UI5 walkthrough for JavaScript has received a revamp and is now also available for TypeScript. The walkthrough is a great resource for beginners and also serves as great documentation for core features of UI5. The TypeScript version is now available on GitHub, including live previews of each step. Check it out and see you soon.

[Srini]Did you know about Luigi? It is an enterprise-ready micro-Frontend framework from SAP. Here you can see the micro-frontend framework in action. This Luigi app can host different frontend applications such as a React app, a SAP UI5 SAP Fiori elements application, an Angular app, all within a single Luigi application. All these different front-end applications can be developed, tested, deployed, and maintained independently by very distributed disks. The documentation is available on this github page and you could try this quick 5 minute tutorial on introduction to luigi Hello everybody, we developers are always curious to try our hands-on new development tools.

[Rekha]Recently, we have heard a lot about SAP Build and SAP Build Code solutions. Although these two solutions sounds the same, let me tell you there is a stark difference between their new stages. What is SAP Build? SAP Build is a low code/no code solution that helps us to accelerate application development, automation and design business websites with drag-and-drop simplicity. These tools are designed keeping business experts in focus irrespective of their coding skills. Then, what is SAP Build code? A generative AI-based code development environment with a true copilot optimized for Java and JavaScript application development for seamless end-to-end coding, testing, integration, and Application Lifecycle Management. This tool is to be used by professionals or Fed developers. Would you like to know more differentials, use-key scenarios, fusion development concept using these two solutions? Then kindly refer to the blog post by our product expert, Franz Schermicke. We are not done yet. I have one more fascinating news. SAP is offering SAP Build Hackathon in the month of April. a 3D virtual event from 16th to 18th April. Now it's your chance to try out SAP Build solutions and get your hands dirty by creating business applications or automating mundane tasks that occur on your day-to-day business. Here you get to join our SAP Build experts, peers, to learn about low-code/no-code journeys, share ideas and experiences. Sounds great, right? For more details, check the blog post by product expert Manhil Nomaslu. Links for the blogs and hackathon registration is provided in the description box below. Until next time, keep building! Thank you!

[Vitaliy]Last weekend, the new 2024 QRC 1 version of SAP Analytics Cloud was released, and with that, the initial release of JustASK. Just ask is the new natural language query feature powered by AI. We just ask any user can query SAG data models by asking questions in everyday English. It supports acquired data models in SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere models. For all details about JustAsk and its configuration steps, please check the blog post by Francois Imberton. But don't forget to explore all Q1 release features with our experts demoing them. Links are in the description. SAP Datasphere product management prepared a what's new post for you as well. There were some interesting new features released last month, like SQL script in transformation flows, or the repository folders to organize the objects in your spaces. While we are discussing topics related to SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere, I would like to draw your attention to the brand new learnings available to help guide you through some key connectivity topics between both. This learning is brought to you by the SAP Enterprise Support Volume Apps organization. A one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub edition for SAP Enterprise Support using a valid S user might be required.

entry.title: Re: SAC Advanced Formulas Accumulated Values
entry.content:
@mayiya 

If you want to do this for multiple records you cannot use variable to accumulate as variable values are not cleared when next record arrives and it will keep adding up. Calculations will happen at lowest level only unless you aggregate explicitly. Use the below code it should work

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "VALOR"

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM], %01AnioProy%)
VARIABLEMEMBER #TotalAnioReal OF [d/Date]


INTEGER @i
INTEGER @x
INTEGER @Month
INTEGER @Iterate
INTEGER @AcumProy
INTEGER @NumMonth
@Month = MONTH(%02InicioProy%) // Parameter used for initial month of projection. In this example es 202309
@Iterate = 12 - @Month
@NumMonth = @Month - 1

DATA([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = "public.Actual")
DATA([d/Date] = %02InicioProy%) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) / @NumMonth
FOR @i = 1 TO @Iterate
@x=@i-1
DATA([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = NEXT(@x, "MONTH", %02InicioProy%))
DATA([d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", %02InicioProy%)) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal)/(@Month+@x)

ENDFOR

I did run a test and it gave me below results

But I still feel you can copy the value of September  into Oct to Dec, it will give you same results

 

Br.

Nikhil
